html:
Exclusive to:

“A carryable container with 6 slots that can hold Slingshot Rounds.”

-

The Ammo Pouch is a character-specific item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can only be crafted by Walter after unlocking the Ammo Hoarder skill. The Ammo Pouch has 6 slots for storing Walter's Slingshot Ammo.

Gallery

  • Ammo Pouch Storage

The Ammo Pouch is a character-specific item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can only be crafted by Walter after unlocking the Ammo Hoarder skill. The Ammo Pouch has 6 slots for storing Walter's Slingshot Ammo.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Túi Đạn là một vật phẩm dành riêng cho từng nhân vật chỉ có trong Don't Starve Together. Nó chỉ có thể được chế tạo bởi Walter sau khi mở khóa kỹ năng Ammo Hoarder. Túi Đạn có 6 khe để đựng Đạn Súng Cao Su của Walter.

{{Scrapbook Info|A carryable container with 6 slots that can hold Slingshot Rounds.}}
The '''Ammo Pouch''' is a character-specific item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It can only be crafted by [[Walter/Don't Starve Together|Walter]] after unlocking the [[Ammo Hoarder]] skill. The Ammo Pouch has 6 slots for storing Walter's [[Slingshot Ammo]].

{{clear}}
